archetype: High-End Minimalist (Apple Care Style) / Archetype 4 Modified
design_principles: Huge, authoritative headings using Plus Jakarta Sans (700-800 weight).
Clean, concise body copy with Inter. Avoid walls of text.
Realistic, high-quality product photography with clean lighting.
Primary CTAs are bold Brand Blue (#0055FF), completely rounded (pill-shaped).
Subtle micro-animations (framer-motion fade-in-up) for smooth entrances.
Clear hierarchy: one primary message per fold.

scales.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-[800] tracking-tighter text-[#111111]

motion.page_transition: framer-motion initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.5, ease: 'easeOut' }}

components.button_primary: bg-[#0055FF] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold hover:bg-[#0044CC] transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center
components.button_secondary: bg-[#F5F5F7] text-[#111111] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold hover:bg-[#E5E5EA] transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center
components.card: bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 sm:p-12 border border-[#E5E5EA] transition-shadow hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]

pages_blueprint.PublicLayout: Minimalist header with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70). Logo on left, clean links center, primary CTA right. Footer expansive and clean.
pages_blueprint.PublicHome: Hero with stark minimal design, huge text. 3-column bento for 'Why us', 'Services', and 'B2B/Insurama' section.
pages_blueprint.PublicServicios: Grid of services with large clean icons/images and minimal text. Hover states to show details.
pages_blueprint.PublicContacto: Two-column layout. Left: Clean typography with contact info. Right: Minimal form with rounded-2xl inputs.
pages_blueprint.PublicPresupuesto: Step-by-step or clean stacked form. Very spacious inputs.
pages_blueprint.PublicAseguradoras: B2B focused. Darker or distinct section headers to highlight SLAs, integrations (Insurama) and high-volume capabilities.
pages_blueprint.PublicPartners: Similar structure to Aseguradoras, focused on repair shops and revendedores.
pages_blueprint.PublicGarantia: Text-heavy but highly readable. Wide margins, H2s breaking up paragraphs.
pages_blueprint.PublicGarantiaExtendida: Product page feel. Hero showcasing peace of mind. Pricing/Tier cards.
pages_blueprint.PublicFAQs: Clean accordion list (Shadcn Accordion) with ample vertical padding between items.
pages_blueprint.Seguimiento: Functional portal. Center the form on screen, huge input for the code, very clear status indicators (like Apple order tracking).

hero_home.description: Clean, professional desk with smartphone repair setup (Apple Care style).

service_screen.description: Broken phone screen closeup for service catalog.

b2b_partners.description: Professional handshake for B2B pages (Aseguradoras & Partners).

warranty_budget.description: Broken smartphone glass on clean surface for budget/warranty.

instructions_to_main_agent: Redesign all 10 public pages and the PublicLayout based on these guidelines.
Ensure total visual coherence across all pages (Apple Care minimalist style).
Use lucide-react for all iconography. No emojis.
Apply 'data-testid' to all interactive elements and CTAs.
DO NOT touch the CRM pages or backend routes.
Preserve existing functionality for the chatbot and /consulta (Seguimiento) form.

For the Revix Logo, implement it as a typography-based React component: Revix.es. Since the user asked for high quality PNG/SVG logo, you will not generate these files physically as you cannot, but explicitly provide an SVG representation in a standalone component (e.g. Logo.jsx) they can use directly.
Mobile-first: Test large headings using fluid typography or Tailwind's responsive prefixes (e.g., text-4xl sm:text-6xl).
Forms: Use Shadcn inputs but give them rounded-2xl shapes (override default radius) to match the Apple aesthetic.
